race.description: Crt Wingham Produce Country Boosted Hcp (Bm58)
race.comment: DEEBEE'S GIRL (3) stepped up in trip and found a heavy surface for the first time which triggered a massive form reversal last start at this track over 1262m, leading all the way for a 5.2-length romp in a Class 1. This is easier if anything so despite going up 4kgs another win looks on the cards. ROYAL TEENS (1) showed a nice change of gears in the heavy ground to get up for a close second last time out over this track and distance. Has not raced for a month but she is deep into the prep so should carry her fitness. Looks a genuine threat. RUBICK DANCER (10) came with a huge finish to grab his maiden win at just start two over 1250m here recently. Has great scope for improvement so this is not out of reach. MOSGIEL DAISY (6) was only beaten half a length two runs back in a comparable race to this under similar track conditions. Worth including in the exotics. Last start Gunnedah maiden winner ARTIE'S MAGIC (2) took a while to show his best but is worth following now.
